transcript:
Agent: BrightTech Technical Support, this is David speaking. How can I assist you today?

Customer: Hi David. My internet keeps dropping every 30 minutes since yesterday. I work from home and this is destroying my productivity. I have already restarted the router three times.

Agent: I understand how critical a stable connection is for remote work, Emma. I am going to help you get this sorted as quickly as possible. Can you describe the lights you see on your router right now?

Customer: The internet light is blinking orange instead of staying solid green.

Agent: That blinking orange light indicates an intermittent connection issue. Let me run a line diagnostic on my end. One moment... I can see signal fluctuation on your line. A couple of questions: have you updated your router firmware recently?

Customer: I have never done that actually. I did not know I needed to.

Agent: That is likely contributing to the problem. I also see some noise on your line that we should address. I will schedule a technician visit to inspect the physical connection. In the meantime, let me walk you through updating the firmware — it may stabilize things immediately. Are you comfortable accessing your router admin panel?

Customer: I think so, but I am not sure how.

Agent: No problem at all. Open a web browser and go to 192.168.1.1 — that is your router admin page. The default login is usually admin for both username and password.

Customer: Okay, I am in. I can see there is a firmware update available.

Agent: Perfect. Go ahead and install it. It will take about 5 to 10 minutes and the router will restart automatically.

Customer: It is installing now... done! The router restarted and the light is solid green now!

Agent: Excellent! The firmware update resolved the immediate issue. However I still want to get a technician out to check that line noise so this does not happen again. Would Thursday the 15th between 2 and 4 PM work for you?

Customer: Yes, that works perfectly. David, thank you so much. You were incredibly patient and helpful.

Agent: It is truly my pleasure, Emma. I have scheduled the technician for Thursday May 15th between 2 and 4 PM. You will receive an SMS confirmation shortly. Have a wonderful and productive rest of your day!
